name: Trifle St. Croix
recipeInstructions:
(From "Above and Beyond Parsley:")
1. In a double boiler, combine egg yolks, milk, vanilla, sugar, salt, and cornstarch. Cook until thickened. Remove from heat. Add nutmeg and rum. Set aside.
2. Lightly oil a springform pan with nonstick vegetable spray. Cover the bottom of the pan with slices of angel food cake. Add 1/2 cup crushed macaroons, followed by 1/2 custard mixture. Repeat cookie layer and custard. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
3. Remove sides of springform pan. Serve with whipped cream and toasted coconut.
